member.name: P:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.Cooldown
member.summary: Cooldown time in seconds before interaction can happen again

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.MaterialSwitcher
member.summary: The Material Switcher component to cycle through (will be enabled on first press)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.DisableOnFirstPress
member.summary: GameObjects to disable on first press

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.ClickSounds
member.summary: Sounds to play on every click (all play at once)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.TooltipTitle
member.summary: The title of the tooltip when hovering. Empty to disable.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.TooltipIcon
member.summary: The icon for the tooltip. Either Material Icons or an Emoji.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.TooltipDescription
member.summary: A longer description for the tooltip.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.IsActivated
member.summary: Whether the TV has been activated (synced across network)

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.RequestInteract(Sandbox.GameObject)
member.summary: Request the host to process the interaction

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.BroadcastClickSounds
member.summary: Broadcast click sounds to all clients (plays all sounds at once)

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.CatTVInteract.BroadcastDisableObjects
member.summary: Broadcast to all clients to disable the specified GameObjects

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.DeadlyLegos.Collider
member.summary: The trigger collider to use. If not set, will find one on this GameObject.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.DeadlyLegos.Damage
member.summary: How much damage to deal when a player steps on the legos

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.DeadlyLegos.DamageCooldown
member.summary: Cooldown before the same player can be hurt again (prevents spam damage)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.DeadlyLegos.DamageSound
member.summary: Sound to play when dealing damage

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.DeadlyLegos.DamageTags
member.summary: Tags for the damage (e.g., "lego", "foot")

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBeans.DestroyOnConsume
member.summary: Should the item be destroyed after being consumed once?

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBeans.ConsumeCooldown
member.summary: Cooldown in seconds before the item can be consumed again (if not destroyed)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBeans.FartSound
member.summary: The fart sound to use for the player

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBeans.ConsumeSound
member.summary: The sound to play when the beans are consumed

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBeans.FartParticlePrefab
member.summary: Optional particle prefab to spawn at the player's pelvis when they fart

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBeans.TooltipTitle
member.summary: The title of the tooltip when hovering. Empty to disable.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBeans.TooltipIcon
member.summary: The icon for the tooltip. Either Material Icons or an Emoji.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBeans.TooltipDescription
member.summary: A longer description for the tooltip.

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.FartBeans.RequestConsume(Sandbox.GameObject)
member.summary: Request the host to process the consumption

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.Cooldown
member.summary: Cooldown time in seconds before the button can be pressed again

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.PressDepth
member.summary: How far the button moves when pressed (in local space)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.AnimationSpeed
member.summary: How fast the button animates in/out

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.PressDirection
member.summary: Which local axis the button moves along when pressed

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.OnPressed
member.summary: Action to trigger when button is pressed

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.PressSound
member.summary: Sound to play when button is pressed

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.ToggleEmitter
member.summary: Cone Emitter to enable temporarily when pressed

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.ToggleDuration
member.summary: How long the ToggleEmitter stays enabled (in seconds)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.TooltipTitle
member.summary: The title of the tooltip when hovering. Empty to disable.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.TooltipIcon
member.summary: The icon for the tooltip. Either Material Icons or an Emoji.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.TooltipDescription
member.summary: A longer description for the tooltip.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.IsPressed
member.summary: Synced press state so all clients see the animation

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.RequestPress(Sandbox.GameObject)
member.summary: Request the host to process the button press

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.BroadcastPressSound
member.summary: Broadcast press sound to all clients

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.FartBoxButton.BroadcastToggleEmitter
member.summary: Broadcast toggle emitter to all clients

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.BaseFartsPerSecond
member.summary: Base fart frequency (farts per second at 0 cans eaten)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.FartIncreasePercentPerCan
member.summary: How much the fart rate increases per can of beans (in percent)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.MaxCans
member.summary: Maximum number of cans that can affect fart rate

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.CansEaten
member.summary: Current number of cans eaten

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.IsActive
member.summary: Is this component currently active and causing farts?

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.FartSound
member.summary: The sound to play when farting

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.FartParticlePrefab
member.summary: Optional particle prefab to spawn at the pelvis when farting

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.AddCan
member.summary: Add a can of beans to the player's count

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.ResetCans
member.summary: Reset cans eaten to zero

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.GetPelvisBone
member.summary: Find the pelvis bone GameObject on the player

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.PlayerFartComponent.FindChildByName(Sandbox.GameObject,System.String)
member.summary: Recursively search for a child GameObject by name (case-insensitive)

member.name: T:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird
member.summary: A networked AI hummingbird that orbits around players and flies away when damaged.

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.DetectionRange
member.summary: Maximum distance to detect and lock onto players

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.OrbitRadius
member.summary: Distance to orbit around the player

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.HoverHeight
member.summary: Height above the player to hover at while orbiting

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.OrbitSpeed
member.summary: How fast to circle around the player

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.FollowSpeed
member.summary: How quickly to follow and catch up to the player's position

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.RotationSpeed
member.summary: How quickly to rotate and orient towards movement direction

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.WanderHeight
member.summary: Height to maintain above ground when no player is detected

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.WanderSpeed
member.summary: Forward flight speed while wandering

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.MinTurnInterval
member.summary: Minimum time between direction changes while wandering

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.MaxTurnInterval
member.summary: Maximum time between direction changes while wandering

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.MinIdleInterval
member.summary: Minimum time between idle/hover periods

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.MaxIdleInterval
member.summary: Maximum time between idle/hover periods

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.IdleDuration
member.summary: How long to hover in place during idle periods

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.DescendSpeed
member.summary: Speed at which the hummingbird descends to reach wander height

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.BobAmount
member.summary: Vertical bobbing distance for natural flight motion

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.BobSpeed
member.summary: Speed of the bobbing motion

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.TiltAmount
member.summary: Banking/roll angle when turning for realistic flight

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.AvoidanceRadius
member.summary: Distance at which to detect and avoid obstacles

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.AvoidanceStrength
member.summary: Force applied to steer away from obstacles

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.GroundCheckDistance
member.summary: Maximum raycast distance for detecting ground below (used for wandering and terrain following)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.MaxTolerance
member.summary: Maximum damage the hummingbird can take before flying away

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.OnFlyAway
member.summary: Event triggered when the hummingbird starts flying away after taking too much damage

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.FlyAwaySpeed
member.summary: Upward speed when flying away after being damaged

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.FlyAwayDuration
member.summary: How long to fly upward before despawning

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.FlyingLoop
member.summary: Looping sound that plays constantly while the hummingbird is alive

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.ChirpLoop
member.summary: Looping chirp sound that plays only when locked onto a player

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.FlyAwayTriggerSound
member.summary: One-shot sound that plays when the hummingbird starts flying away

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.TryGetGroundHeight(Vector3,System.Single@)
member.summary: Get ground height with smart caching to reduce raycast frequency Only performs raycast if enough time has passed or bird has moved significantly

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.UpdateCachedPlayers
member.summary: Update the player cache - removes invalid/out-of-range players and adds new ones Performance optimization to avoid Scene.GetAllObjects every frame

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.FindNearestPlayer
member.summary: Find the nearest player from the cached player list (much faster than scanning all objects)

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.Hummingbird.ApplyCollisionAvoidance
member.summary: Apply collision avoidance forces to steer away from nearby obstacles Optimized with early exits and cached calculations

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.MaterialSwitcher.Materials
member.summary: List of materials that can be switched between

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.MaterialSwitcher.CurrentIndex
member.summary: Current material index (synced across network)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.MaterialSwitcher.IsActivated
member.summary: Whether the switcher has been activated (won't apply materials until true)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.MaterialSwitcher.Renderer
member.summary: The model renderer to apply materials to

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.MaterialSwitcher.Activate
member.summary: Activate the switcher and apply the current material (host-authoritative)

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.MaterialSwitcher.SetMaterialByIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the material by index (host-authoritative)
member.param: Index of the material to apply

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.MaterialSwitcher.NextMaterial
member.summary: Go to the next material in the list (host-authoritative)

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.MaterialSwitcher.PreviousMaterial
member.summary: Go to the previous material in the list (host-authoritative)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Podcast.Person1Sounds
member.summary: The sound event containing Person 1's voice lines

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Podcast.Person2Sounds
member.summary: The sound event containing Person 2's voice lines

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Podcast.Music
member.summary: Background music to play (set the .sound to loop)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Podcast.MusicPosition
member.summary: The GameObject representing the music position (sounds play from here)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Podcast.Person1VoicePoint
member.summary: The GameObject representing Person 1's position (must have a Sound Point component)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Podcast.Person2VoicePoint
member.summary: The GameObject representing Person 2's position (must have a Sound Point component)

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Podcast.DelayBetweenLines
member.summary: Delay in seconds between voice lines

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Podcast.AutoStart
member.summary: Should the podcast start playing automatically?

member.name: P:SandboxAddon.Podcast.EndPrefab
member.summary: Prefab to spawn when the podcast finishes (optional)

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.Podcast.StartPodcast
member.summary: Starts the podcast playback

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.Podcast.StopPodcast
member.summary: Stops the podcast playback

member.name: T:SandboxAddon.SimpleTurret
member.summary: A hitscan turret that detects and shoots at players within range. Works in multiplayer with server authority.

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.SimpleTurret.BroadcastShot(Vector3,Vector3,System.Boolean)
member.summary: RPC method to broadcast visual/audio effects to all clients. Optimized to avoid creating long-running async tasks.

member.name: T:SandboxAddon.TurretHealth
member.summary: A health component that can receive damage and trigger events when destroyed. Similar to Prop health system but simplified for custom use cases.

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.TurretHealth.OnDamage(Sandbox.DamageInfo@)
member.summary: Called when this component receives damage. Implements IDamageable interface.

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.TurretHealth.BroadcastDestruction
member.summary: RPC method to broadcast destruction effects to all clients.

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.TurretHealth.DestroyAfterDelay
member.summary: Destroys the GameObject after the configured delay (called only on server).

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.TurretHealth.Heal
member.summary: Restore health to maximum.

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.TurretHealth.Heal(System.Single)
member.summary: Restore a specific amount of health.

member.name: M:SandboxAddon.TurretHealth.GetHealthPercentage
member.summary: Get health as a percentage (0-1).
